value.body:
## Context

Cycle already has shortcut infrastructure, and keyboard-first workflows are important for developer tools. Users need discoverability and conflict protection.

## Outcome

A command map lists available shortcuts, lets users discover command palette actions, and prevents conflicting registrations.

## Acceptance criteria

- Shortcut help is reachable from settings and a keyboard shortcut.
- Commands list shortcut, scope, description, enabled state, and conflict state.
- Existing shortcuts for navigation, create issue, back, and sidebar toggle are documented.
- Shortcut registration tests catch duplicate or ambiguous sequences.
- UI remains accessible by keyboard and screen reader labels.

frontmatter.title: Add shortcut discoverability and a command map UI

value.title: Add shortcut discoverability and a command map UI
